title: Plasplug Stc305 Super Toggle Cavity Anchors (5)
features: • Suitable for shelving units, wall cabinets, wall clocks etc.
description: Product Description Plasplugs' Super Toggle fixings have expanding wings which spread load over a wide area, making them ideal for overhead applications, especially for lath and plaster and plasterboard.Adjust to grip different wall thicknesses - from 10mm to 15mm.Typical applications: Wall clocks, shelving units, wall cabinets, bathroom cabinets.Drill size: 8mm.Screw size: No.8 (4.5mm). Supplied in a pack of 5. Founded in 1970, Plasplugs' first product was the General Purpose wall plug, the first plastic plug to sell effectively in the market place. Today, Plasplugs still manufacture plastic plugs, but has extended its portfolio to include fasteners, tiling tools, knives, abrasives, electrical products and power tools. Their mission is to make difficult jobs easier. Renowned for innovation, Plasplugs invests considerably in research and design, frequently launching new products. The newest and most exciting product is the Diamond Wheel Tile Cutter. Its unique water recycling system avoids hazardous water spillage and allows water to be re-used- no more constant refilling. Manufacturer's Description Plasplug Super Toggle Cavity Anchors This cavity fixing has a nylon anchor arm which tightens its grip from behind the face surface when the screw is rotated. It self adjusts for thicknesses of 6 -17mm. Drill size 10mm. For screw size No.8 only. Pack Quantity of 5. Box Contains 5 x Super Toggle heavy-duty anchors See more
